text: Hyperliquid's infrastructure and ecosystem are gaining institutional and developer recognition. MetaMask now fully supports HyperEVM, enhancing accessibility. Harvard Business School has incorporated Hyperliquid into its curriculum, reflecting its growing academic and regulatory interest. Additionally, RedStone, the oracle provider behind Hyperliquid's infrastructure, highlights its role in supporting real-world asset tokenization and AI agent deployment, emphasizing the robustness and institutional-grade quality of the data infrastructure underpinning Hyperliquid.
author: elfa_2037888431788019883

text: The broader crypto and macro market environment is volatile with significant liquidation events, geopolitical tensions, and macroeconomic pressures. Despite this, Hyperliquid's token $HYPE shows resilience and is considered a strong trade by analysts, outperforming many assets and benefiting from growing interest in tradfi perpetuals on-chain. The token is viewed as undervalued relative to its market cap and potential, especially given its expansion into options, insurance, and structured products markets.
author: elfa_2037975510953955438

text: HIP-3, Hyperliquid's proposal for integrating real-world assets and expanding its ecosystem, has been won by @tradexyz for now. Research and reverse engineering efforts on HIP-4, Hyperliquid's prediction market system, have revealed detailed contract structures and fee mechanisms, indicating ongoing development and innovation in Hyperliquid's product offerings.
author: elfa_2038053195763634578

text: Hyperliquid ($HYPE) continues to demonstrate strong market performance and real revenue generation, outperforming major assets like BTC, ETH, and traditional protocols such as Aave and Lido. It operates as a decentralized Nasdaq-like platform with a fully on-chain Central Limit Order Book, generating significant daily trading fees (over $2 million) and funneling 99% of revenue into buybacks and burns, creating a sustainable growth flywheel. The ecosystem is expanding with HyperCore and HyperEVM, supporting perps, spot, lending, and upcoming prediction markets, while HIP-3 accounts for a large share of volume and open interest, including real-world assets like oil, silver, and gold. Institutional interest is strong, with whale accumulations and open interest surging. Hyperliquid is also integrated with MetaMask and is recognized for its low latency and high throughput infrastructure.
author: elfa_2037886110140187069

text: Agents Don't Click Ads. That Changes Everything. The entire advertising economy assumes a human at the other end of the screen. Trust is a moat. Source:

text: According to Reuters, Coinbase has announced a partnership with mortgage lender Better Home & Finance to allow homebuyers to pledge Bitcoin or USDC in their accounts as collateral for down payment loans. This loan will be separate from the Fannie Mae-backed primary home mortgage. Homebuyers can thereby avoid selling their crypto assets directly, preserving potential appreciation and deferring tax liabilities. Furthermore, as long as on-time payments are maintained, a drop in the collateral's value will not trigger margin calls. — link
